corrected_fields.summary: This is the Bank of Canada's statistics portal index page, listing available data categories including exchange rates, interest rates, money market yields, price indexes, and economic indicators. The page provides access to various data lookup tools and download options but does not contain any specific data values, policy decisions, or research findings—it is a navigation page for the Bank's data offerings.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page has no direct market relevance as it contains no specific data or policy content. It serves only as a navigation index to the Bank of Canada's statistical database.
